structure: [subject] + [verb] + [adjective] + [object] | e.g. The woman buys a small book.
[subject] + [to be] + [adjective] | e.g. The orange is red.
[subject] + [to have] + [object] | e.g. The teacher has a book.
[subject] + [to have] + [adjective] + [object] | e.g. The woman has a small gift.
[subject] + [verb] + [preposition] + [object] | e.g. The student goes to the university.
[subject] + [verb] + [object] + [preposition] + [object] | e.g. The man drinks water from a bottle.
[subject] + and + [subject] + [verb] | e.g. The dog and the cat run.
[subject] + and + [subject] + [verb] + [object] | e.g. The man and the woman drink coffee.
